{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Grandmaster Tartarus
| introduced = The Crimson Vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Grandmaster Tartarus]] died in an attack.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c14">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Grandmaster Tartarus]] was killed by [[Alin]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c10">''City of Light'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
